scripts.build: npm run -w shardwire build && npm run -w @shardwire/react build && npm run -w website build
scripts.verify: npm run -w shardwire verify && npm run -w @shardwire/react typecheck && npm run -w @shardwire/react build && npm run -w website build
scripts.pkg:verify: npm run -w shardwire verify && npm run -w @shardwire/react typecheck && npm run -w @shardwire/react build
